message:
fix(codegen): Use proper implementations for builtins module type checks

The builtins_mod.zig was using placeholder implementations (genTrue)
for issubclass, hasattr, and callable that always returned true. This
caused incorrect runtime behavior when these functions were called via
the builtins module (e.g., builtins.issubclass()).

Changes:
- Replace genTrue placeholders with proper implementations from type_checks.zig
- Replace genNull/genVoid placeholders with proper implementations from dynamic_attrs.zig
- Remove unused placeholder functions (genIsinstance, genTrue, genNull, genVoid)
- Add imports for type_checks and dynamic_attrs modules

This ensures builtins.issubclass(), builtins.hasattr(), and builtins.callable()
have the same correct behavior as the direct calls isinstance(), hasattr(),
and callable().
